summary: Critical issues: Actions not pinned to commit SHAs (lines 8, 11)—major security violation. Workflow references missing fixture files (test_fixtures/*.txt) and label_rules.json, making it non-functional. Task requires test harness to capture act output to act-result.txt and validate results—entirely absent. No error handling on script step (line 16); doesn't check exit code or capture output. Python script is well-structured with good error handling, but lacks type hints and glob-matching logic (match_file) is underdocumented. Workflow doesn't validate job success as required. Would fail immediately if executed.
